summary: EXP-237 ready. Three atomic substring patches on WIN-069 (tldr_evidence, tldr_verdict, detail_evidence paragraph 2) that replace the 10,000× headline multiplier with ~250,000× anchored on sub-meter geodetic positioning and collapse the "four to five orders of magnitude" hedge to a clean "five orders of magnitude" consistent with the new multiplier. mm-level GNSS (~8 orders) and sub-mm VLBI (~9 orders) are retained as secondary gap-widening callouts in detail_evidence. All three before-strings verified unique (count=1). Section 10 in sections.json is out of scope (no order-of-magnitude claim lives there). detail_verdict_text untouched (already internally consistent).
